settings.heading: Every Guardian Has a Soul
settings.subheading: Walk slowly. When one calls you, don't let it pass.

settings.title: Each piece is unrepeatable
settings.body: No molds. No mass production. Every Guardian is hand-sculpted in our studio in Piriápolis. When one is gone, it doesn't repeat.

settings.title: A message that only you will understand
settings.body: Every Guardian comes with a channeled letter: a personal message we don't write — it flows through us. Thousands of Chosen ones in 45 countries confirm it: the words always reach where they need to reach.

settings.title: +15,000 Guardians have already found a home
settings.body: From Piriápolis to the world. Each Guardian travels via DHL Express if you're abroad, or DAC if you're in Uruguay, protected like the work of art it is, with real-time tracking.

settings.title: A gift that no one forgets
settings.body: Giving one of our Guardians isn't an ordinary gift. It's a complete experience: personal channeled letter, activation ritual, certificate, and digital portal. The person who receives it will never forget the moment.

settings.label: The Experience
settings.title: You don't buy an object. You receive a message.
settings.body: Our most special Guardians arrive with a channeled letter: words written exclusively for you, that we don't control or choose. Thousands of people write us saying the same thing: "How did you know exactly what I needed to hear?". You will have all of this available in our exclusive section for The Chosen, called "Mi Magia".
settings.quote: "I opened the package, read the letter, and cried. It said exactly what I needed to hear. I don't know how they do it."

settings.title: Hand-Sculpted Sculpture
settings.description: Professional cold porcelain, combined with magics that make it flexible, mimicking skin. Natural crystals, painted, modeled, and sewn by hand. Between 20 and 60 hours of work per creation.
settings.compare_us: We transform by hand without molds

settings.title: Channeling
settings.description: Our creations move through a 7-day channeling process where you collaborate energetically, no matter where in the world you are. We receive a message from your Guardian during the channeling. Each letter is one-of-a-kind and unrepeatable, like the Guardian who brings it. You don't only receive your Guardian… you receive the message they have for you.
settings.compare_them: We refuse to give you something empty, lifeless, without history.
settings.compare_us: We do the personal channeling study and share it with you.

settings.title: Authentic Crystals
settings.description: Every Guardian and creation carries natural crystals selected for their essence and energetic purpose. Nothing is synthetic.
settings.compare_them: We refuse to give you painted plastic and tell you they are real stones.
settings.compare_us: You will always have 100% real crystals

settings.title: Certificate of authenticity
settings.description: Name, essence, element, crystals, powers, and the complete story of your Guardian documented — all of this in our Exclusive Portal.
settings.compare_them: We refuse to deliver something generic, without identity.
settings.compare_us: Each piece arrives signed and identified with its full history.

settings.title: Activation Ritual
settings.description: Step-by-step guide to seal the energetic connection with your Guardian when it arrives in your hands. The most intimate moment of the process.
settings.compare_us: We want to give you a COMPLETE guided spiritual Experience.

settings.title: Access Our "My Magic" Portal
settings.description: Lifetime digital access to guides, meditations, and exclusive content to deepen the connection with your Guardian.
settings.compare_them: Nobody else is willing to offer you so much once you already have your Guardian
settings.compare_us: We believe in our Community, that's why we give you exclusive content.

settings.title: Why do our Guardians cost what they cost?

settings.label: One-of-a-kind pieces
settings.title: When they leave, they don't come back. Ever.
settings.body: There is no repeated stock. There is no "I'll see it later." Every Guardian you see on this page exists only once in the world. The medium-sized, large, and giant ones are 100% unrepeatable — when someone adopts them, they disappear forever.
settings.counter_text: Manifest what you long for, with the guidance of an elemental being
settings.small_text: More than 15,000 Guardians have already found their home in 45+ countries.

settings.text: The package arrives sealed with our seal. No one touched it before you. That moment is yours.
The channeled letter arrives in a wax-sealed envelope. Read it in silence — the words inside are only for you.
Your Guardian is protected in premium packaging. Take it with both hands — it is your first contact with their energy.
Follow the Activation Ritual: choose a special place, light a candle, read aloud. That's how the bond begins.

settings.eyebrow: OPENING IT IS PART OF THE MAGIC

settings.subtitle: The Chosen. Real moments. Guardians that already found their home.

settings.text: You give everything to others and at the end nothing is left for you.
You carry emotions that aren't yours and your body pays the price.
You feel an emptiness that returns even when everything is "fine."
You have gut feelings that always end up being right.
You find feathers, mirror hours, four-leaf clovers… and you don't know why.
People tell you their things without knowing why they trust you.

settings.label: Synchronicities
settings.subheading: If you mark more than two, this isn't a coincidence. The universe is talking to you.
settings.cta_text: FIND OUT WHICH ONE IS LOOKING FOR YOU

settings.heading: Who We Are
settings.subheading: A family that transformed their life by channeling elemental energy.
settings.story:
We are Gabriel and Thibisay. A family of 5 who chose to live in Piriápolis — the alchemist city of Uruguay — and who in 2015 discovered something that wasn't in any plan: the ability to channel elemental beings through the use and transformation of various materials.

With no formal artistic training, no investors, no formulas. Only intuition, silence, and the certainty that what flowed through our hands was pure magic. Every piece we have created, since day one, was born with a name, a story, and a purpose. And every person who received one told us the same thing: "How did you know exactly what I needed?"

Today, more than 15,000 Guardians live in 45+ countries. Everything is still made by hand. Everything still comes out of the same studio. And every channeled letter still reaches exactly where it needs to reach.
settings.signature: With love from Piriápolis · Gabriel & Thibisay · Since 2015

settings.title: Special Gift
settings.description: We send the channeling form to the person receiving it. Even though they already know they will receive a gift… the message will be 100% personal for that person, and they will be amazed.

settings.title: Surprise Gift
settings.description: If you want it to be 100% a surprise… You fill out a special form about the person. We prepare our magics and they only find out when they open the package.

settings.label: Gift Magic… YES, Guardians can be acquired by you, or as a gift from someone else.
settings.title: The gift that changes the day. And sometimes, a life.
settings.body: Gifting one of our Guardians is not a common gift. It's a complete experience: personal channeled letter, activation ritual, certificate, and digital portal. The person who receives it will never forget the moment they received this very special detail.

settings.title: 1. Choose Your Guardian
settings.description: Browse the shop or take the Guardian Test. When one (or more) stops you, don't ignore it — that is the sign.

settings.title: 2. Tell us your moment
settings.description: After purchase you receive a brief form. Your answer is the foundation of the channeling.

settings.title: 3. We channel your message
settings.description: We connect with the energy of your Guardian. What flows is a letter that only makes sense to you.

settings.title: 4. Your personal letter
settings.description: A sealed letter with words we don't choose. Read it in a moment of silence — you will understand why.

settings.title: 5. Arrives at your door
settings.description: DHL Express international (5-10 days after the channeling) or DAC in Uruguay (2-3 days after the channeling). With full tracking.

settings.eyebrow: FROM THE STUDIO TO YOUR HOME
settings.heading: From our studio to your hands

settings.title: Your One-of-a-Kind Guardian
settings.description: Hand-crafted sculpture made entirely by hand. Each one exists only once in the world. With authentic natural crystals.

settings.title: Personal Channeled Letter
settings.description: A message we don't write — it flows through us for you. The words always reach where they need to reach.

settings.title: Certificate of Authenticity
settings.description: Name, essence, element, crystals, powers, and the complete story of your Guardian. Signed and documented.

settings.title: Activation Ritual
settings.description: Step-by-step guide to seal the connection with your Guardian. The most intimate and powerful moment of the entire experience.

settings.title: Premium Packaging
settings.description: Handcrafted box. Your Guardian travels like the work of art it is. The unboxing is part of the ritual.

settings.title: Mi Magia Portal
settings.description: Lifetime access to guides, rituals, meditations, and exclusive content for adopters. Your connection doesn't end — it deepens.

settings.title: What you receive with your Guardian
settings.subtitle: You don't receive "a decorative figure" — you receive a complete experience of connection that includes everything you need.

settings.title: Your Guardian arrives in perfect condition anywhere in the world.
settings.subtitle: Each piece travels with packaging designed to protect it. If something goes wrong along the way (although honestly… it has never happened to us), we resolve it.

settings.question: What is a channeled Guardian?
settings.answer: An elemental being hand-sculpted, that moves through processes of alchemy and transformation, arriving with a personal channeled letter — a message that flows through us and only makes sense to you… it stops being a simple decorative figure, becoming an ally with the energy of Mother Earth that sought to connect with you to walk together through part of your evolution and theirs, since it is a mutual collaboration.

settings.question: Do you ship worldwide?
settings.answer: Yes. We ship worldwide. Your Guardian travels with premium protection.

settings.question: Can I choose what the letter says?
settings.answer: No. The letter is channeled — we don't choose the words. What arrives is exactly what you need to hear, even if you don't yet know it.

settings.question: Can I gift it?
settings.answer: Yes, and it's the most transformative gift that exists. It comes with a personalized channeled letter for whoever receives it. You can choose surprise gift or open gift.

settings.question: Why is each Guardian one-of-a-kind?
settings.answer: Because they are sculpted by hand without molds, between 20 and 60 hours each. Our intention is to give you something authentic, one-of-a-kind, and exceptional.

But it won't wait forever — remember they also seek to evolve and can't let opportunities pass, just as you shouldn't either.
